title: Support inside expressions with strings and doubles

features.name: string variable inside string literal set
features.description: Code should include a string variable compared using the inside operator against a set of string literals

features.name: real variable inside floating-point literal set
features.description: Code should include a real/double variable compared using the inside operator against a set of floating-point literals

features.name: string inside expression in class method
features.description: Code should include a string variable inside an inside expression evaluated within a class task or function
